title: Stick to Your Guns
writer: Clarence E. Mulford, J. Benton Cheney
actors: William Boyd, Andy Clyde, Brad King
plot: A former Bar 20 cowhand is now a cattle rancher and having trouble with rustlers. Hoppy and the Bar 20 gang ride in and surround the the bad guys. June Winters joins the posse and serves as the romantic partner for posse co-leader...
